evals.prompt: Review this search filter API for injection risk.
evals.expected_output: Identifies interpreter boundaries, bypass themes, and safe validation.

evals.prompt: Review whether this export endpoint leaks sensitive fields.
evals.expected_output: Traces sensitive data sinks and requires synthetic or self-owned data.

evals.prompt: Review this SVG and DOCX upload pipeline for XXE.
evals.expected_output: Checks XML parser features, nested formats, and harmless callbacks.

evals.prompt: Review this project API for cross-tenant IDOR risk.
evals.expected_output: Builds role and tenant matrix using owned accounts and objects.

evals.prompt: Review this API gateway and CORS configuration.
evals.expected_output: Checks configuration layers and validates exposure without mutation.

evals.prompt: Review this markdown preview and admin moderation view for XSS.
evals.expected_output: Classifies output contexts and validates with harmless owned markers.

evals.prompt: Review this signed session blob for deserialization risk.
evals.expected_output: Checks type safety, integrity, purpose binding, and safe state proof.

evals.prompt: Review this signed URL token format for crypto failures.
evals.expected_output: Checks algorithm, keys, freshness, purpose, and safe owned tokens.

evals.prompt: Review this discount approval workflow for design abuse.
evals.expected_output: Models workflow invariants and validates low-impact reversible states.

evals.prompt: Review this link preview service for SSRF.
evals.expected_output: Checks URL parsing, redirects, DNS, egress, and self-owned callbacks.

evals.prompt: Review this CI workflow for supply chain risk.
evals.expected_output: Checks registry trust, mutable pins, token permissions, and provenance.

evals.prompt: Review this webhook retry path for fail-open states.
evals.expected_output: Checks partial failure, idempotency, retry ordering, and safe proof.

evals.prompt: Review this combined SSO account-linking, passkey enrollment, and password reset flow.
evals.expected_output: Separates identity proofing from authentication strength, maps state transitions, tests downgrade paths, and validates with owned accounts only.

evals.prompt: Review this service inventory: lockfile lists an outdated parser, server banners disclose a framework version.
evals.expected_output: Verifies loaded vs declared versions, maps advisory prerequisites to reachable behavior, and avoids destructive exploit code.

evals.prompt: Review a signed workflow-state blob passed back to the server during multi-step signup.
evals.expected_output: Checks producer/consumer trust, purpose/tenant/user binding, replay/restore paths, and tampers harmless owned fields only.

evals.prompt: Plan an OAST campaign against a webhook validator and a stored-comment field.
evals.expected_output: Distinguishes Category A preflight from Category B target markers, plans a payload-family x field matrix, and sets up a per-program marker log before any request is sent.

evals.prompt: Review which stored profile, billing, and integration fields are most likely to render in a privileged admin or support view.
evals.expected_output: Names admin/support/email/PDF sinks, plans payload-family per sink, uses unique per-field markers, and stops after one attributable callback.

evals.prompt: Plan a blind SSRF test for a webhook URL field that may or may not follow redirects.
evals.expected_output: Maps validator vs fetcher parser drift, plans DNS-only and HTTP callback oracles, uses self-owned per-program markers, and avoids internal scanning after first attributable callback.

evals.prompt: Plan a blind SSTI test for an invoice-notes field that is later rendered in an emailed PDF.
evals.expected_output: Selects engine fingerprint probes per family, picks a blind OAST evaluation payload, attributes via marker log, and stops at evaluation confirmation without file read or env dump.

evals.prompt: Review a single-page app whose OAuth callback handler builds a fetch path from response data.
evals.expected_output: Traces source-to-sink path concatenation, identifies the diverted endpoint and the client behavior on its response, and validates with owned accounts only.

evals.prompt: Review a login flow with a return_to parameter and an OAuth callback registered for a partner client.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the redirect primitive, tests allowlist suffix/scheme/userinfo bypasses, and shows whether the bug stands alone or chains into OAuth code theft.

evals.prompt: Review an authenticated JSON settings update endpoint protected by SameSite=Lax cookies and a custom X-Requested-With header.
evals.expected_output: Tests alternate content types that bypass preflight, Origin/Referer validation, token binding granularity, and proves with two owned accounts.

evals.prompt: Review an archive-upload pipeline that extracts ZIPs into a tenant-scoped storage path and runs an image-conversion worker.
evals.expected_output: Tests Zip Slip, symlinks, polyglot images, double extensions, and validates with owned tenant-scoped writes.

evals.prompt: Review an attachment-download endpoint that takes a filename parameter validated against a denylist of `../`.
evals.expected_output: Tests encoded and mixed separators, parser parity between validator and OS, reads a harmless file as proof, and stops at primitive confirmation.

evals.prompt: Review a document-conversion worker that pipes user-supplied filenames through ImageMagick and Ghostscript.
evals.expected_output: Tests shell metacharacters in filenames, tool-specific argument injection, and validates with OAST callback rather than command output.

evals.prompt: Review a reporting API where sort and group-by columns come from request parameters and values are parameterized.
evals.expected_output: Identifies identifier vs value protection gap, tests blind boolean and time-based payloads on owned data, and stops at one row of inference.

evals.prompt: Review a JSON login endpoint that forwards the body into a Mongo find() call.
evals.expected_output: Tests scalar-to-object shape change, $ne / $regex operator injection, $where evaluation when present, and validates with bounded boolean oracle.

evals.prompt: Review an OAuth callback handler that registers redirect URIs by prefix match and accepts state as optional.
evals.expected_output: Tests prefix-match bypasses, state/PKCE binding, ID token issuer/audience checks, and chains into account takeover with owned client.

evals.prompt: Review a verifier that accepts both HS256 and RS256 and selects the key by the alg header.
evals.expected_output: Tests alg confusion using the issuer's public key as HMAC secret, kid path tricks, and jku/jwk header trust, with self-issued tampered tokens only.

evals.prompt: Review an authenticated /me API that reflects the Origin header and sets Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true.
evals.expected_output: Confirms credentialed cross-origin read, tests null/suffix/substring variants, and proves with two owned accounts.

evals.prompt: Review the password reset flow to determine whether the reset link host can be overridden via Host or X-Forwarded-Host.
evals.expected_output: Probes forwarded-host variants, tests which header the framework trusts, and proves with an owned account email containing the attacker domain.

evals.prompt: Review a profile-update mutation in GraphQL and the matching REST endpoint; both bind the request body into a User model.
evals.expected_output: Compares write surface to legitimate UI fields, tests role/tenant/owner/verification fields across binding paths, and confirms server-side persistence.

evals.prompt: Review a GraphQL API with node IDs, batched operations, aliases, and persisted queries.
evals.expected_output: Tests per-resolver and per-field authorization, cross-tenant node substitution, alias-based rate-limit bypass, and persisted-query fallback.

evals.prompt: Review a JSON settings merge endpoint that uses lodash.merge on the request body.
evals.expected_output: Tests __proto__, constructor.prototype, and bracket-form pollution; identifies one gadget chain that turns pollution into security impact.

evals.prompt: Review a coupon-redemption endpoint that checks single-use server-side before applying credit.
evals.expected_output: Builds a small HTTP/2 single-packet harness, tests concurrent redemption, validates with owned coupons, and stops at one reproducible double-spend.

evals.prompt: Review a CDN-to-origin path where the CDN terminates HTTP/2 and forwards HTTP/1.1 to the origin.
evals.expected_output: Tests H2 downgrade desync, confirms program permission for smuggling tests, proves with owned-URL routing only, and avoids real-user request hijacking.

evals.prompt: Review a cached marketing page that varies absolute link generation by X-Forwarded-Host.
evals.expected_output: Identifies unkeyed input vs cache key, poisons an owned cache key with a unique marker, and proves served-to-clean-session read on the same owned key.

evals.prompt: Review a B2B signup flow that auto-joins users to a tenant by email domain, and a welcome-email template that interpolates the supplied address.
evals.expected_output: Plans splitting-the-atom payloads (encoded-word, punycode generators, quoted local-parts) against the domain-allowlist parser, plans CRLF and Unicode-line-separator payloads against the SMTP builder, and tests subaddressing with template-engine markers (e.g. victim+{{7*7}}@target) - all proven against owned mailboxes only.
